title: psephellus declinatus
intro: Psephellus declinatus, also known as the Declining Scabious, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Psephellus declinatus include reducing inflammation, relieving bronchial spasms, and soothing sore throats. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves making a tea by infusing the flowers in hot water or using it as a tincture, although modern research is limited, and more studies are needed to confirm its full range of uses.
